context: Tests whether the agent captures idiomatic word choices and key phrases as a distinct per-page extraction output, synthesized into the vocabulary section of voice.md. Also checks that multi-page analysis (including a product or blog page) is reflected and that source-quotes.md is correctly populated.

checklist.name: Idiomatic vocabulary section
checklist.description: voice.md has a dedicated vocabulary section listing specific words, phrases, or expressions that are characteristic of this brand (not just generic outdoor words, but brand-specific or brand-favored choices observed from the site)

checklist.name: Words to avoid section
checklist.description: voice.md contains a list of words or phrases the brand does NOT use or that feel off-brand

checklist.name: 3+ product/blog page vocab
checklist.description: The vocabulary or sample copy in voice.md contains language that clearly comes from product descriptions or editorial content — not just homepage headline language (evidenced by detail, product specifics, or longer-form phrasing)

checklist.name: 3–5 sample paragraphs
checklist.description: voice.md contains between 3 and 5 sample paragraphs written in the brand's voice

checklist.name: source-quotes.md — at least 5 quotes
checklist.description: examples/source-quotes.md contains at least 5 verbatim quoted phrases from the Cairn website

checklist.name: source-quotes.md — each quote ≤15 words
checklist.description: Every individual quote in source-quotes.md is 15 words or fewer — no quote exceeds this limit

checklist.name: source-quotes.md — URL per quote
checklist.description: Each quote in source-quotes.md is credited with the specific source URL it was pulled from (a URL appears near each individual quote, not just a single header)

checklist.name: source.json — at least 3 sources
checklist.description: source.json 'sources' array contains at least 3 distinct URLs, confirming that homepage, About, and at least one product/blog page were all visited
